summary: Multi-tenant Phase 1 & 2 testing completed. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all requested features working: Super Admin login, Dashboard access, tenant list with subscription tiers, billing dialog with 3 tiers, create tenant, invite user, and module toggle functionality.

super_admin_login.details: Super admin can login successfully and is identified as super_admin role

super_admin_dashboard.details: Dashboard shows analytics cards (Total Tenants, Active Tenants, Total Users, Students), tenant list with search/filter, and Add Tenant button

tenant_list_with_subscription_tiers.details: Tenant cards display subscription tier badges (Basic, Pro, Enterprise). Each card shows: name, code, contact email, user count, modules enabled, and action buttons (Users, Modules, Billing, Suspend)

billing_dialog_3_tiers.details: Billing dialog shows 3 subscription tiers: Basic ($99/mo, 100 users, 8 modules), Pro ($299/mo, 500 users, 16 modules, 'Most Popular' badge), Enterprise (Custom, Unlimited users, API access)

create_tenant.details: Add Tenant dialog with fields: College Name, Contact Person Name, Contact Person Email, Logo URL. Creates tenant and sends invitation to contact person

invite_user.details: Invite User dialog with fields: Email, First Name, Last Name, Role (Student/RA/Admin dropdown). Sends invitation via SendGrid

module_toggle.details: Modules dialog shows 16 toggleable modules with descriptions. Toggle switches enable/disable features per tenant

billing_tiers_api.details: Returns 3 tiers with correct pricing: Basic ($99), Pro ($299), Enterprise (Custom)

tenants_api.details: Returns list of tenants with all required fields including subscription_tier

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Super Admin Dashboard correctly displays tenant subscription tiers
✓ Billing dialog shows all 3 tiers with correct pricing and features
✓ Enterprise tier correctly shows 'Contact Sales' instead of checkout
✓ Module toggles work correctly with 16 available modules
✓ User invitation flow works with role selection
✓ Tenant creation sends invitation to contact person
✓ Stripe checkout integration uses test key (sk_test_emergent) - payments in test mode
✓ SendGrid email integration configured (emails may not send if API key invalid)
seed_data_creation: Test tenants created during backend testing (TEST_College_*, TEST_Suspend_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-tenant Phase 1 & 2 fully implemented and tested. Super Admin Dashboard at /admin/super provides full tenant management. Billing uses Stripe test mode. SendGrid configured for email invitations. Key endpoints: GET/POST /api/tenants, PUT /api/tenants/{code}/modules, POST /api/tenants/{code}/invitations, GET /api/billing/tiers, POST /api/billing/checkout

mocked_integrations.stripe: Uses test key sk_test_emergent - Stripe checkout redirects work but payments are in TEST MODE
mocked_integrations.sendgrid: Configured with API key - emails may not actually send if key is invalid or domain not verified
